The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Medical Non-euclidean Anomaly

Air conditioning cycles with cold precision.
Workstations hold final paranoia entries.
Corners hide watchful presences.
Beacon turned tomb for grand ambitions.
Scientist vanished pre-breach.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.
